title: Kattipidi Lyrics Vettai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Vijay Prakash, Shwetha Pandit
Song: Kattipidi
Lyrics: Na.Muthukumar

Kattipidi enna Kattipidi
ne eppodhum kuthaaadha roja sedi
Vittu pudi enna thotu pidi
idhu villendhi vilayadum vettai adi

Niram maarum poo neeyadi
unna parikaamal thoduthaen adi
Annaiyaadha thee neeyadi
unnai annaikaamal annaithaen adi

Kattipidi enna Kattipidi
naan eppodhum kuthaadha roja chedi
vittuppidi enna thottuppidi
naan vittaalum thottaadum mullai kodi

Ye konji pesadi kutti-ma, konnu podadi chellama
kaiyyum odala, kaalum odala, ellaam unnaala
Ye seeri paayada singama, vetti podada thangama
enna venumo kaetu vaangiko, rendu kannaala

Adi aavaaaram poovukku, aalillaa theevukku
Orange-u mala megam naandhaan-adi
Adi pogaadha oorukku, pollaaadha kaattukku
rendaaga kaikorthu phovom-adi

Ada ennamo pannura, ennamo sollura
kathaadi pol nenju koothaadudhe

Indha mutham thaan podhuma, innum onnuthaan venuma
indha kannama, andha kannama veru ennaamma?

Enna kaetkathaan venuma, udhadu kaetuthaan theenduma
Mothamaaga ne kattikollada
naan un kannamma

Adi maama-nu nee solla, yemmaa-nu naan solla
aamaa-nu ulloora kalloorudhe

Adi azhagaaga nee thulla, palagaadha siru pulla
Idhu enna pudhu podhai thallaadudhe..

Ada ennamo pannura, ennamo sollura
kathaadi pol nenju koothaadudhe

Kattipidi enna Kattipidi
ne eppodhum kuthaaadha roja sedi
Vittu pudi enna thotu pidi
idhu villendhi vilayadum vettai adi

Niram maarum poo neeyadi
unna parikaamal thoduthaen adi
Annaiyaadha thee neeyadi
unnai annaikaamal annaithaen adi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kattipidi?

The song Kattipidi is an energetic and romantic number that captures the playful essence of young love.

Who are the singers of Kattipidi?

The song is sung by Shweta Pandit and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for the movie Vettai?

The music for Vettai was composed by Yuvan.

What is the release year of the movie Vettai?

The movie Vettai was released in the year 2011.

What role does the song play in the movie Vettai?

The song Kattipidi adds a lively and romantic touch to the film, enhancing the youthful and vibrant atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kattipidi from the movie Vettai is a lively and energetic duet that showcases the playful and romantic dynamics between the characters. Sung by Shweta Pandit and Vijay Prakash, the song is set to Yuvan's catchy and upbeat music. It captures the essence of youthful love and excitement, making it a perfect fit for party and celebration scenes. The lyrics by Na Muthukumar add a poetic charm, enhancing the overall feel of the song.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the vibrant energy of Kattipidi from the movie Vettai, where Yuvan's electrifying beats meet the dynamic vocals of Shweta Pandit and Vijay Prakash. This song captures the essence of youthful romance with a peppy twist. Dive into the rhythmic world of Kattipidi and let the music take over your senses.
stanzaMeanings: Hold me tight, always hold me tight. Don't prick like a rose bush. Let go and catch me, touch and hold me. This is a playful hunt.
You are a flower that changes color, I tied you without plucking. You are a fire that can't be controlled, I embraced you without getting burned.
Eyes wide open, eyes wide open, come closer to my heart.
Hold me tight, always hold me tight. Don't prick like a rose bush. Let go and catch me, touch and hold me. Even if I let go, the jasmine vine will still cling.
Hey, talk sweetly, dear. Knock me out, darling. Hands and legs are all because of you. Hey, jump fiercely, lion. Cut it, my dear. Ask for what you want, take it with both eyes.
For the flower without fragrance, for the island without people, I am the orange cloud. For the place we can't go, for the bad forest, let's hold hands and go together.
You're doing something, saying something, my heart is dancing like a kite.
Eyes wide open, eyes wide open, come closer to my heart.
Is this kiss enough, do you want one more? This dear one, that dear one, what's the difference?
What do you want to ask, should I touch your lips? Hold me completely, I am yours, dear.
You say 'uncle', I say 'aunt', the whole town is laughing.
You jump beautifully, little one, don't get used to it. What is this new intoxication swaying?
You're doing something, saying something, my heart is dancing like a kite.
Hold me tight, always hold me tight. Don't prick like a rose bush. Let go and catch me, touch and hold me. This is a playful hunt.
You are a flower that changes color, I tied you without plucking. You are a fire that can't be controlled, I embraced you without getting burned.
